title: Great American Music Hall - Reviews, Photos & Deals 2026 - San Francisco, CA - WeddingWire
content: Great American Music Hall is a historic San Francisco, California music hall and wedding venue. The Great American Music Hall is the ideal spot to host a large number of people. This beautiful and historic venue nestled in the heart of San Francisco offers a number of accommodations to those who are holding a private event at their facility. In addition to the above services, the Great American Music Hall offers many bar package options and catering services for your private event including a deluxe open bar to a no-host cash bar. Up until the Great Depression in 1933, the Great American Music Hall was the most popular entertainment spot in the area, offering music, fine food and gambling. In the years that followed, the hall closed and reopened on a number of occasions until in 1972, when the Great American Music Hall opened and become the space that it is today.
